_meta.description: Monthly premium / business figures per insurer. Drives Monthly view of Premium Engine and Executive Overview.
_meta.notes: Empty until a monthly fetcher has its first successful run. Segment-wise premium (health/retail/group/government/overseas + motor/fire/crop/marine/other, both monthly and YTD) comes from ingest-gicouncil-segment.ts — drop the official GI Council Segmentwise XLSX into data/raw/gicouncil/segment/<YYYY-MM>.xlsx (or set INGEST_FETCH_PROXY) to populate. Monthly view in the UI shows EmptyState while this is empty.
